## Checklist for Self-Review prior to PR Creation
<!-- What should I focus on when reviewing my own work? -->
- [ ] All PR checklist items are completed
- [ ] Check document structure completeness
- [ ] Check all hyperlinks are valid and point to the correct location
- [ ] Verify document naming convention (id, name) and location of the document
